giving_basis: Forbes Top Givers (Feb 2026): cash out the door through end-2025, valued at donation; excludes the $10B Earth Fund pledge (~$2.4B disbursed) and Day One Fund pledges (~$850M granted).

Cumulative Musk Foundation grants actually paid through 2024 per 990-PF filings; excludes ~$7.6B of stock parked in his own foundation. 19.8% includes 304M option shares exercisable within 60 days (~13% excluding).
Cumulative Jen-Hsun & Lori Huang Foundation grants paid 2007-2024 from 990-PF filings, valued at grant date; foundation holds ~$9.2B earmarked but not yet given.

Bill + Melinda contributions actually transferred to the Gates Foundation through Dec 31 2025, per the foundation fact sheet, valued at transfer. Stake is last SEC-documented (FY2019 proxy, 1.34%); he left the board in 2020 so current holdings are undisclosed and smaller.

Cumulative Carl Victor Page Memorial Foundation grants through 2023 per 990-PFs; ~99.9% went to donor-advised funds. Stake = 389.1M Class B / 12.116B total A+B+C shares; proxy excludes his non-voting Class C, so economic stake is higher (27.4% of voting power).

Forbes Top Givers (Feb 2026) lifetime out-the-door estimate through end-2025 (rank #9), incl. ~$2.2B Parkinson's research. Stake = 358.9M Class B + 37k Class A / 12.116B total; Class C undisclosed so economic stake is higher (25.3% voting power).

Forbes Top Givers (Feb 2026) lifetime out-the-door for Zuckerberg + Chan via CZI (rank #8), valued at gift date; the 99%-of-shares pledge is overwhelmingly unfulfilled so far. Stake = 341.8M Class B + 0.6M Class A / 2.538B total (60.8% voting power).

Forbes Top Givers (Feb 2026) rank #1: Berkshire stock actually donated since 2006 through end-2025, valued at donation date ($47.9B of it to the Gates Foundation). Stake = 196,317 Class A + 1,114 Class B = ~13.7% economic, ~30% voting.
